sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31064" key="*ei)lh/quia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Εἰλήθυια</orth>, <sense id="n31064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Εἰλείθυια</ref></xr>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n31064.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> name of a kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">comet</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> Astr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
